session.name: MPI-324 RunPod validation sweep (1.2.0 release gate) — staging done on CPU pod, GPU verification pending

goal.original: Umbrella session to validate every RunPod-deferred 1.2.0 card in ONE Pod session so cards can close before the Thursday release. Do downloads on a cheap CPU 'download-mode' pod first, then switch to a GPU pod on the same volume for generation. MPI-198 deferred by the user.
goal.summary: Staging is COMPLETE on a CPU download-mode Pod: all sweep weights are on the 150GB network volume (vol id 9t3awufudk). Next is the GPU-pod half: connect to the SAME volume and run MPI-324 validation phases A-D. No generation has run yet.

completed: Built umbrella card MPI-324 with the session runsheet (order + cross-card gotchas + results table)

MPI-309 unblocked: bumped dev_configs/node_lock.json MpiNodes pin ba9e1569 -> aaa1d2d9fa713decae6843e64f5a81b84f9f443d (v1.2.6). Class-map diff is a pure superset (adds MpiBox/MpiBoxCrop/MpiBoxMask/MpiFromBox, removes nothing). UNCOMMITTED.

CPU download-mode Pod: staged all sweep weights onto the volume — Qwen Image Edit (installed), Krea 2 (installed), the shared abliterated encoder qwen3vl_4b_abliterated_fp8_scaled.safetensors (5.24GB, satisfies both Krea 2 and Image Describer), Head Swap app deps (Qwen-backed + 1.2GB extra, app reads READY). Volume ~62GB/150GB.
Diagnosed the stuck Image-Describer install row to root; folded the fix into MPI-320 and deferred to v1.3 (user decision).
pending: Delete CPU pod; create a GPU pod attached to the SAME volume 9t3awufudk

GPU first-checks: (1) Head Swap enqueue does NOT reject app_head_swap.json with unknown-node-type = MPI-309 box nodes landed; (2) does the describer row settle + does Describe image work; (3) tier radios route (Quality != Hyper step count)
Phase A: Head Swap remote generation (MPI-299/306)
Phase B: Krea 2 masked edit (MPI-282) — accel LoRA resolves, tier-2 8+3 steps not silently baked, crop/stitch no seam
Phase C: Qwen-Edit (MPI-300) — tiers route, 2-image combine, 3rd-image chip (untested anywhere), style rack
Phase D LAST: Image Describer (MPI-310) — describe from gallery+history, negative-mode flip, inverse GC check, then uninstall (5GB refetch risk) dead last
Fill the MPI-324 results table; move each sub-card to done on its own remote pass
After the Pod confirms it reinstalled MpiNodes aaa1d2d, commit dev_configs/node_lock.json and close MPI-309

task_card.title: RunPod validation sweep (1.2.0 release gate): MPI-282, MPI-300, MPI-310, Head Swap

allowed_actions: drive the Pod validation with the user (user operates the app + connects the Pod)
fill MPI-324 results table + sub-card validation.md files
move a sub-card to done ONLY on its own remote pass
commit dev_configs/node_lock.json AFTER the Pod confirms the aaa1d2d reinstall

completed: MPI-309 move to doing/validating + node_lock bump rationale logged (task.json + events.jsonl + board.json)
MPI-310: remote stuck-plugin-row repro + root-cause hypothesis logged
MPI-320: plugin-row branch-order fix + reconciler/plugin-awareness + shared-dep completion fan-out folded in, deferred v1.3
pending: Commit dev_configs/node_lock.json once the GPU Pod verifies it reinstalled MpiNodes aaa1d2d (currently uncommitted)
On each sub-card remote pass: update its validation.md + move to done
Session close-out (/mpi-end) after the sweep to file any residual findings

next_action.description: Staging on the CPU download pod is done — all sweep weights are on volume 9t3awufudk (~62GB/150GB). Delete the CPU pod, create a GPU pod on the SAME volume, connect, then run the first-checks and MPI-324 phases A-D per .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/MPI-324/validation.md. First check is Head Swap enqueue (no unknown-node rejection = MPI-309 box nodes proven).

key_decisions: CPU-then-GPU (Design A 'No GPU download only') to stage weights cheaply before paying for a GPU — blessed flow; the -cpu image runs wrapper-only, no ComfyUI.
Head Swap folded into the sweep because MPI-309 (node_lock bump) unblocks it and the user had already pushed MpiNodes v1.2.6; MpiFromBox rode along too.
Stuck Image-Describer install ROW is NOT a v1.2 blocker: describe keys off pluginAvailability (disk truth), so the feature works. Fix folded into MPI-320 for v1.3 (do NOT patch during release week).
MPI-198 explicitly deferred (Linux/mac LOCAL engine, not a RunPod concern).
constraints: local-engine pass proves NOTHING about the remote path (feedback_runpod_not_local_engine_proof) — everything in the sweep has passed locally, none on a Pod.
The GPU pod MUST attach the same volume 9t3awufudk or the staged weights are gone.

MPI-282 remote risks: krea2-lora-accelerator (new MPI-316 dep) must resolve (silent-degrade if missing); turbo-ON must render tier 2 (8+3 steps), tier is INJECTED and failure is silent; backslash subfolder LoRA path on Linux (existing LoRAs work this way — confirm).
MPI-300: the 3rd-image chip (Input_Image_3) is untested ANYWHERE, not just remotely.
MPI-310 uninstall test is DEAD LAST of the whole session (re-install = 5GB refetch); do the inverse GC check (uninstall an unrelated model, describer stays Installed) first.
The describer plugin row will keep showing 'Installing' this session — expected, ignore it; verify via the Describe image action instead.

resume_prompt: Read .agents/mpi-kanban/state/handoffs/f3cb9c0b-6711-44da-b84e-a86f3a452768.json and use mpi-continue to resume the MPI-324 RunPod validation sweep for the 1.2.0 release. Staging is DONE: all sweep weights (Qwen Image Edit, Krea 2, the shared abliterated encoder, Head Swap deps) are on the 150GB network volume 9t3awufudk, staged on a cheap CPU download-mode pod. The user will now delete the CPU pod and create a GPU pod on that SAME volume. Once connected, run the first-checks then phases A-D from .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/MPI-324/validation.md: (A) Head Swap remote gen — the very first check is that enqueuing Head Swap does NOT reject app_head_swap.json with an unknown-node-type, which proves MPI-309's node_lock bump to MpiNodes aaa1d2d landed on the Pod; (B) Krea 2 masked edit; (C) Qwen-Edit incl. the untested 3rd-image chip; (D) Image Describer LAST, uninstall dead-last. The Image Describer install ROW is stuck on 'Installing' — that is a known display bug folded into MPI-320 for v1.3, NOT a blocker; verify the describer via the Describe image action instead. dev_configs/node_lock.json is bumped but UNCOMMITTED — commit it only after the Pod confirms it reinstalled MpiNodes aaa1d2d. Fill the MPI-324 results table and move each sub-card to done only on its own remote pass. MPI-198 stays deferred.
